form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Last start 9th (Fr10) over 1609m at this track, beaten 35 m by Dont Drop The Ball (1:50.30) in NW5000L5CD on March 28 at $24.30. The start before 6th (Fr8) over 1609m at Yonkers Raceway beaten 17 m by Bonniprinclouis (1:56.00) in NW5000L5 on March 13 at $4.60. Watch for a far better effort this time.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into eighth behind Boiling Oar at Yonkers Raceway over 1609m in a NW7500L5 on March 30 at $63.55. Then a handy effort when beaten by 9 m finishing third behind Stonebridge Reef at this track over 1609m in a NW5000L5CD on April 4 at $68.20. Nicely placed to take this out.
